title: Cosmos Memory — flip-and-match pairs of glowing cosmic symbols
summary: A real, self-contained Cosmos Memory match game in one HTML file with zero dependencies. A 4x4 grid of face-down cards hides eight pairs of glowing cosmic symbols (star, orbit, bloom, leaf, comet, sun, ring, diamond). Click or tap two cards to flip them; matching pairs lock and glow, mismatches flip back; a moves counter and pairs-found score track progress and you win when all eight pairs are matched. Keyboard and touch both work, with a restart button and R key. It also ships a deterministic self-playing attract demo for capture: a perfect-memory AI flips seeded pairs in order as a pure function of time.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html (or open in any browser). CONTROLS: click/tap a face-down card to flip it, flip two to attempt a match; press R or the Restart button to deal a new board (touch buttons supported). GOAL/SCORING: match all 8 cosmic-symbol pairs in as few Moves as possible; matched pairs glow and lock, the HUD shows Moves and Pairs found, and SOLVED appears on a win. KEY TECHNIQUES: a mulberry32-seeded deck (Fisher-Yates shuffle, never Math.random in the sim) plus a deterministic 'perfect memory' auto-player that flips known pairs in a fixed seeded order; drawAt(ms) re-derives the whole board state purely from time (resolved pairs locked+glowing, current pair mid-flip) with a frame-0 offset so capture starts mid-game. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 self-plays + window.__seek(t). TUNE: A_SEED, FLIP (ms per pair), OFFSET (frame-0 mid-game point), LOOP, the SYM color/glyph table, grid COLS/ROWS.
